description:
Assess an edentulous site in the posterior mandible for implant feasibility based on inter-radicular space (root proximity). Identify a missing posterior tooth site (e.g., #19, #30, #18, or #31) and measure the mesial-distal distance between the adjacent roots at the alveolar crest and at 6mm apical to the crest. Determine if a 4.0mm implant is feasible, which requires at least 7.0mm of space at both measurement locations. Save a screenshot showing the measurements to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\root_space_analysis.png and create a text report at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\feasibility_report.txt using the following format:

SITE_ANALYSIS
Selected Site: [Tooth Number]
Distance at Crest: [X.X] mm
Distance at 6mm Depth: [Y.Y] mm
4.0mm Implant Feasible: [YES/NO]
